name: local-dependency-resolver
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace hosting the local-dependency-resolver plugin for Maven projects.

plugins.name: local-dependency-resolver
plugins.description: Resolves Maven dependencies (groupId/artifactId) to local source checkouts. Scans one or more project roots configured in paths.config.json (defaults to ~/projects and ~/Documents/Projects) so Claude can read and edit dependency code directly instead of inspecting JARs.
